zh-CN.summary: Preview Release 0.1 网站预览版。游戏安装包尚未公开发布，当前用于展示项目介绍、截图和下载状态。
changelog: 准备 Preview Release 0.1 网站。
展示真实宣传图和玩法示意截图。
下载入口保持待发布状态，避免提供无效安装包链接。
knownIssues: 游戏安装包尚未公开下载。
文件大小和 SHA-256 会在真实构建产物发布时补齐。

en.summary: Preview Release 0.1 website build. Game installers are not publicly released yet; this page currently presents the project, screenshots, and release status.
changelog: Show real promotional artwork and gameplay preview screenshots.
Keep download entries in Coming Soon state to avoid invalid installer links.
knownIssues: The game installer is not publicly downloadable yet.
File size and SHA-256 will be added when real build artifacts are published.

note: This file is currently maintained manually from src/data/downloads.ts. Add a generation script before real releases.
